---
title: "People"
---

### "BCF"
::: {layout="[[1,1], [1,1]]"}
![](Mark.JPG)
[Mark Raleigh](https://cryosight.org/mark-raleigh/)
:::

### Current Lab Group
::: {layout="[[1,1], [1,1]]"}
![](Jordy_2.png)
[Jordan Herbert](http://jordan-herbert.com/)

![Lena Nyblade](snowman_fig.JPG)

![Olivia Stanley](snowman_fig.JPG)

![Spencer Shaw](Spencer_Shaw.JPG)

![](Bareera.JPG)
[Bareera Nadeem](https://cryosight.org/bareera-mirza/)

:::
 
### Former Students
Eric Smyth, PhD, 2022

[Hannah Bonner, PhD, 2022](https://www.linkedin.com/in/hannah-bonner-694316b0?trk=contact-info)
